summary: coral-wraith ships a postinstall script that exfiltrates host data
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and combines os/child_process/fs reads with http.request calls. The script collects host identifiers (os.hostname() referenced at lines 34, 65, and 83), reads from the filesystem (fs.readFileSync at line 87), invokes child_process for command execution, and emits the gathered data via http.request calls at lines 49 and 69. This is the canonical install-time host-exfiltration shape: lifecycle hook + system info + filesystem read + outbound HTTP, fired without user consent on a default install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
